title: Repair Rust CoAP block and request IDs
description: Implement RFC-aware Block2 offset validation and collision-resistant process-local MID/token generation. Do not transplant weak checkpoint wall-clock logic.
acceptance_criteria: Legal SZX changes preserve offsets; gaps/overlaps reject; concurrent requests do not reuse MID/token pairs; clock failure cannot yield fixed IDs; tests/clippy and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Implemented RFC-aware Block2 offset/SZX/state validation in 367e5da6b and randomized atomic process-local MID/token allocation in 1472cb78d. 23 default and 47 Tokio tests pass; strict all-feature Clippy passes; independent RFC/concurrency tests and three final reviews clean.
